title: ClothingCraft
body:
## Description
Are you tired of the look of your character? Do you want to give it a new look, but you don't know how or don't want to draw a new skin? Then this mod is definitely for you!

This mod adds over 100 different pieces of clothing such as boots, sneakers, T-shirts, sweaters, caps and more

For example, you can become a policeman or a construction worker by wearing the appropriate uniform. Or you can wear a creeper costume and scare your friends!
## Additional
If you find a bug or want to add something of your own, write either to dummoin5@gmail.com

This mod is a port of Juju's ClothingCraft

All credits to JujuAwesomeBeans
